Original Requirement: WHILE VehSpd is within [0 kph, 250 kph], THE SYSTEM SHALL process the VehSpd value within [50 ms].
Corrected Requirement: WHILE VehSpd is within [0 kph, 250 kph], THE SYSTEM SHALL process the VehSpd value within [50 ms].

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd > 250 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: IF VehSpd > 250 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI - transition to safe state.

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd < 0 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_LO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_LO - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: IF VehSpd < 0 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_LO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_LO - transition to safe state.

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd is not received within [50 ms], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_TO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_TO - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: IF VehSpd is not received within [50 ms], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_TO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_TO - transition to safe state.

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd AliveCounter is unchanged for [3 consecutive cycles], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_ALC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_ALC - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: IF VehSpd AliveCounter is unchanged for [3 consecutive cycles], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_ALC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_ALC - transition to safe state.

Original Requirement: IF VehSpd CRC is invalid, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_CRC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_CRC - transition to safe state.
Corrected Requirement: IF VehSpd CRC is invalid, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_CRC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_CRC - transition to safe state.
